name: Sphere of Annihilation
description: This 2-foot-diameter black sphere is a hole in the multiverse, hovering in space and stabilized by a magical field surrounding it.

destruction.effect: Obliterates all matter it passes through
destruction.exceptions: Artifacts may pass through unscathed unless susceptible to damage
destruction.contact_damage: 8d10 Force damage to anything touched but not wholly engulfed

control.on_success: Control until start of next turn, lose control if transferred

movement.movement: Up to 5 feet times Intelligence modifier (minimum 5)
movement.on_failure: 8d10 Force damage, obliterated at 0 HP (no remains, possessions left behind)
movement.on_success: Success means touched but not obliterated

planar_interactions.trigger: Contact with planar portal or extradimensional space

results.51-85: Sphere moves through portal or into extradimensional space
results.86-00: Spatial rift sends sphere and creatures/objects within 180 feet to random plane
